task: Compare Apple watches and  learn more about the ultra version on apple.
final_result_response:
I've now thoroughly explored both the Apple Watch comparison page and the Apple Watch Ultra 3 details page on apple.com. Here's a comprehensive summary of everything I found:

---

## 🍎 Apple Watch Comparison (from apple.com/watch/compare)

### Three Current Models:

| Feature | Series 11 | SE 3 | Ultra 3 |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Price (GPS)** | From $399 | From $249 | — |
| **Price (GPS + Cellular)** | From $499 | From $299 | From $799 |
| **Case** | 46mm or 42mm, Aluminum or Titanium | 44mm or 40mm, Aluminum | 49mm, Titanium |
| **Display** | Always-On, 2000 nits, Wide-angle OLED, LTPO3 | Always-On, 1000 nits, OLED, LTPO | Always-On, 3000 nits, Wide-angle OLED, LTPO3 |
| **Health** | Hypertension, ECG, Blood Oxygen | ❌ Hypertension, ❌ ECG, ❌ Blood Oxygen | Hypertension, ECG, Blood Oxygen |
| **Water Resistance** | 50m (swim, snorkel) | 50m (swim only) | **100m** (swim, snorkel, scuba, high-speed sports) |
| **Depth Gauge** | 6m | ❌ | **40m** |
| **GPS** | Standard | Standard | **Precision dual-frequency** |
| **Satellite** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ Cellular + Satellite |
| **Battery** | Up to 24 hrs | Up to 18 hrs | **Up to 42 hrs** |
| **Chip** | S10 | S10 | S10 |
| **Safety** | Emergency SOS, Fall/Crash Detection | Emergency SOS, Fall/Crash Detection | + **Emergency SOS via Satellite, Siren** |

All three share: Sleep tracking, Sleep apnea notifications, Temperature sensing, Cycle Tracking, Wrist flick/Double tap gestures, On-device Siri, and 5G capability.

---

## 🏔️ Apple Watch Ultra 3 — Deep Dive

**Tagline:** *"Personal beast."*

### Key Highlights:
- **Built-in Satellite Communications** — Stay connected off the grid via Messages (iMessage/SMS), Emergency SOS, and Find My via satellite
- **Best GPS in a sports watch** — Precision dual-frequency GPS
- **Running Features** — Advanced metrics (running power, cadence), Custom Workouts, Workout Buddy, VO₂ max estimates
- **Action Button** — Customizable for quick control over workouts, intervals, and segments
- **New 5G modem** — Better coverage in weak reception areas
- **Battery** — Up to 42 hrs normal / 72 hrs Low Power Mode / 14 hrs outdoor workout with GPS / 35 hrs outdoor workout in Low Power Mode / Fast-charge 15 min = 12 hrs
- **Cycling** — Real-time speed and efficiency monitoring
- **Swimming** — Tracks sets, detects stroke patterns, calculates distance
- **Design** — 49mm titanium case (Natural or Black), up to 3000 nits brightness, available in two titanium finishes
- **Durability** — Water resistant to 100m, depth gauge to 40m, water temperature sensor

The Ultra 3 is Apple's most capable and rugged watch, designed specifically for serious athletes, adventurers, and outdoor enthusiasts who need extreme durability, long battery life, and off-grid connectivity.
